title: Ladies Must Live
writer: Alice Duer Miller, George Loane Tucker
actors: Robert Ellis, Mahlon Hamilton, Betty Compson
plot: Schooled by her wealthy brother-in-law William Hollins, Christine Bleeker plans to marry Ralph Lincourt when he is divorced. He, however, is equally pursued by Nancy Barron, whom Christine dislikes. Ned Klegg loves social secretar...
